data.title: Trump selects new economic adviser to temporarily replace Federal Reserve Board member Adriana Kugler, who resigned on Aug. 1.
data.description: On August 1st, Adriana Kugler, a member of the Federal Reserve Board of Governors, announced her resignation. This move opens the position for a nominee chosen by President Trump at the United States central bank.
ATN announces Q2 2025 results, confirms 2025 outlook unchanged. #finance #stocks

data.title: KBR wins FEED contract for Abadi Onshore LNG Project in Indonesia from INPEX Masela Ltd. on Aug 7, 2025.
data.description: KBR revealed on August 7, 2025, that it secured a contract from INPEX Masela Ltd. to conduct front-end engineering design (FEED) for onshore liquefied natural gas facilities as part of the Abadi LNG project in Indonesia. The company's stock trades under the symbol "KBR" on the NYSE.

data.title: Serve Robotics reports Q2 2025 financial results as a leading autonomous delivery company, listed on Nasdaq as SERV.
data.description: Serve Robotics Inc., a prominent autonomous sidewalk delivery firm, disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ending on June 30, 2025. The company, traded on Nasdaq under SERV, shared the results from this period in San Francisco on Aug. 7, 2025.

data.title: RLJ Lodging Trust Q2 2025: $363.1M in Total Revenues, $28.6M Net Income, $113.0M Hotel EBITDA. Shares repurchased.
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland, RLJ Lodging Trust (NYSE: RLJ) announced its financial results for the second quarter of the year ending June 30, 2025. The company reported a Portfolio Comparable RevPAR of $155.08, down by 2.1% compared to the same period last year. Total Revenues amounted to $363.1 million with Net Income reaching $28.6 million. Comparable Hotel EBITDA stood at $113.0 million, while Adjusted EBITDA was reported at $104.0 million. Additionally, Adjusted FFO per diluted common share and unit was $0.48. The company also repurchased 0.8 million shares for an approximate amount of $.

data.title: RMR Group secures $1.0B refinancing deal for Vertex Pharmaceuticals HQ in Boston Seaport District.
data.description: Newton, Massachusetts - The RMR Group (Nasdaq: RMR) reported that a $1.0 billion, five-year, interest-only fixed-rate mortgage financing has been arranged by its managed joint venture. The mortgage carries a weighted-average interest rate of 5.5957% and is backed by Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated’s 1.1 million square foot headquarters located at 50 Northern Avenue and 11 Fan Pier Boulevard in the Boston Seaport district. The purpose of the financing is mainly to settle existing debts.

data.title: Velocity Financial, Inc. (NYSE: VEL) reported $26.0M net income in 2Q25, up from $14.8M in 2Q24, with $0.69 earnings per share.
data.description: Velocity Financial, Inc., a prominent provider of business purpose loans, recently disclosed its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025. The company reported a net income of $26.0 million and core net income of $27.5 million for this period, a substantial increase compared to $14.8 million and $15.9 million, respectively, in the second quarter of 2024. Earnings and core earnings per diluted share were reported at $0.69 and $0.73 for the second quarter of 2025, marking a significant rise from $0.42 and $0.45 in the same period of 2024. The company expressed satisfaction with its strong momentum in 2025 and highlighted achieving two record-breaking financial milestones.

data.title: Carlisle Companies (NYSE: CSL) raises dividend by 10% to $1.10 per share annually. 49th consecutive increase.
data.description: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz.-- Carlisle Companies Incorporated revealed a significant update, as its Board of Directors greenlit a 10% boost in the regular quarterly dividend. This increase raises the dividend per share from $1.00 to $1.10, resulting in an annualized dividend of $4.40 per share. Shareholders of record as of August 19, 2025, will receive the increased dividend on September 2, 2025. According to Chris Koch, the company's Chair, President, and CEO, this marks Carlisle's 49th consecutive year of dividend increases.

data.title: Arlo's Q2 2025 results: Subscribers grew by 30% to $78 million, ARR increased by 34% to $316 million.
data.description: In Carlsbad, California, Arlo Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: ARLO), a prominent smart home security platform firm, released its financial outcomes for the quarter ending June 29, 2025. The introduction of the new AI platform, Arlo Secure 6, has had a significant impact on the company's success. Subscriptions and services revenue surged by 30% to reach $78 million, while the Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) soared to $316 million, marking a substantial 34% increase compared to the previous year. Additionally, the non-GAAP su...

data.title: Alarm.com Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALRM) reported Q2 2025 results with SaaS revenue up by 9% to $170 million.
data.description: In Tysons, Virginia, Alarm.com Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALRM) announced its financial outcomes for the second quarter concluding on June 30, 2025. They stated an increase in SaaS and license revenue by 9.0% up to $170.0 million for the second quarter of 2025 compared to the same period in 2024. The company also disclosed its financial projection for SaaS and license revenue for the third quarter of 2025 and raised its guidance for the entire year of 2025.

data.title: Manitowoc Company reports Q2 2025 net income of $1.5M. Orders: $453.9M, backlog: $729.3M. Sales: $539.5M (4% decrease).
data.description: In Milwaukee, The Manitowoc Company, Inc. shared their second-quarter financial results, showcasing a net income of $1.5 million, or $0.04 per diluted share. Adjusted net income for the same period was $2.8 million, equivalent to $0.08 per diluted share. The company received orders totaling $453.9 million during the second quarter, marking a 6.0% increase from the previous year and generating a backlog of $729.3 million. However, net sales for the quarter amounted to $539.5 million, a 4.0% decline year-on-year.

data.title: Largest Core Scientific shareholder to oppose CoreWeave buyout, deeming offer undervalued in new letter.
data.description: In a recent shareholder letter, Two Seas Capital expressed concern that the buyout offer for Core Scientific fails to accurately assess the true value of the company's business. The letter highlights that the current offer greatly undervalues Core Scientific, despite its impressive financial performance. This discrepancy in valuation figures is a matter of concern for investors, as the offer may not be reflective of the company's actual worth. Shareholders are urged to carefully consider the letter's insights before making any decisions regarding the buyout offer for Core Scientific.

data.title: Vistagen (Nasdaq: VTGN) reports Q1 financial results for fiscal year 2026, ended June 30, 2025, in neuroscience development.
data.description: In South San Francisco, Vistagen (Nasdaq: VTGN), a biopharmaceutical company focused on neuroscience and developing intranasal pherines, released its fiscal year 2026 first quarter financial results ending June 30, 2025. The company highlighted progress in various pipeline programs. Shawn Singh, the President, expressed satisfaction with the quarter's productivity.

data.title: Western Forest Products Inc. reported Adjusted EBITDA of $0.5 million in Q2 2025 due to $3.6 million inventory provision expense.
data.description: Western Forest Products Inc. disclosed its financial results for the second quarter of 2025, posting an Adjusted EBITDA of $0.5 million. This figure reflects a significant inventory provision expense of $3.6 million attributed to the plummeting prices of specific lumber products. Contrasting this, the company recorded an Adjusted EBITDA of $9.4 million in the second quarter of 2024, inclusive of a $5.3 million recovery from inventory provisions. In the first quarter of 2025, Western reported an Adjusted EBITDA of $3.5 million, which encompassed an inventory provision expense of $1.8 million. The company's performance in the second quarter of 2025 was notably impacted by these financial factors.

data.title: Urgently Inc. (Nasdaq: ULY) to release second quarter 2025 financial results; date announced.
data.description: Urgent.ly Inc., a prominent digital roadside and mobility assistance technology provider based in the U.S., revealed that it will be releasing its financial results for the second quarter of 2025. The announcement was made on August 7, 2025, with the company trading under the Nasdaq symbol ULY. Urgent.ly is known for its innovative solutions in this sector and is anticipated to provide insights into its performance during this period. Investors and analysts are keenly awaiting the disclosed numbers to gauge the company's financial standing.

data.title: Stone Ridge buys Oklahoma assets from ConocoPhillips for $1.3 billion, 2nd acquisition this year.
data.description: Stone Ridge Holdings Group, a financial services company specializing in alternative asset management, reinsurance, and bitcoin, revealed today that its energy arm, Stone Ridge Energy, has finalized a deal to purchase a significant collection of Oklahoma energy assets from ConocoPhillips for around $1.3 billion. This acquisition follows SRE’s prior purchase of over $1 billion in energy assets in Colorado earlier this year, marking their second acquisition in 2023.

data.title: The Trade Desk (TTD) Q2 earnings report: $0.41/share earnings, $694.03M revenue, surpassing Street estimate. Stock plunges.
data.description: Trade Desk, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTD) announced its Q2 results after the market closed on Thursday. The company reported earnings of 41 cents per share, meeting analysts' expectations. Quarterly revenue stood at $694.03 million, surpassing the projected $684.99 million. For real-time TTD stock price and chart, please visit the website. Explore further details on Benzinga.com.
